libConfigServer.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the language server.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run bundle
scripts.package:local: npm run compile && npm run bundle && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-yarn --out libconfig-lang.vsix
scripts.version: node scripts/update-version.js && git add client/package.json server/package.json README.md
scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ..
scripts.install:local: npm run package:local && code --install-extension libconfig-lang.vsix --force && code-insiders --install-extension libconfig-lang.vsix --force
scripts.reinstall:local: npm run package:local && (code --uninstall-extension borkra.libconfig-lang || true) && (code-insiders --uninstall-extension borkra.libconfig-lang || true) && code --install-extension libconfig-lang.vsix --force && code-insiders --install-extension libconfig-lang.vsix --force
